title: SPECTRA: A Traceability Ontology for the 3GPP RAN Standardization Process
description:
SPECTRA is a reusable OWL 2 ontology modeling the document types, relationships, and lifecycle of the 3GPP Radio Access Network (RAN) standardization process. It comprises 26 classes (Tdoc, Resolution, CR, LS, Section, Spec, TechnicalReport, TRImpact, Meeting, Company, WorkingGroup, ...), 53 object properties, and 81 data properties; it reuses Dublin Core and FOAF and is licensed under CC-BY 4.0.

This release accompanies the ISWC 2026 Resources Track paper of the same title. The release includes the OWL ontology, PyLODE-generated HTML documentation, SHACL shapes, representative competency questions with their Cypher and SPARQL translations, and a synthetic instantiation example.
